We use SafetyKit for…

Core modules that make kit compliance simple and repeatable.

Kit Scanning
Scan, log and verify contents in seconds — works offline.
Expiry Tracking
Predictive alerts months before items expire.
Inventory Alerts
Low-stock triggers and suggested reorders.
Audit Logs
Complete evidence trail for every check.
Compliance Dashboard
Centre & room visibility at a glance.
AI Safety Assistant
Quick SOP answers and reminders.

Harmony Early Learning — Kit Compliance

90% faster
kit checks
100%
expiry capture
$1,800
annual savings

Harmony Early Learning runs multiple centres and struggled with manual kit checks, inconsistent expiry monitoring, and time-consuming audit prep. SafetyKit automated scanning, tracking and reporting so the team now runs quick checks and pulls audit reports in seconds.

"We don't think about kit compliance anymore — SafetyKit handles it." — Regional Manager
